subject: refactor(debug): use debugAdd for pre-React error bridge instead of manual entry construction
body:
The bridge code was bypassing debugAdd() — directly constructing entry
objects, pushing to the internal entries array, and incrementing nextId
manually. If debugAdd changes (new fields, validation, side effects),
the bridge would be out of sync.

Fix: add optional timestamp parameter to debugAdd (defaults to
Date.now()), then call debugAdd from the bridge with the original
error timestamp. All entry construction now flows through one function.

Tags: debug, refactor
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
